positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
2. ! [X0,X1] : (reads(X0,X1) => gains_knowledge(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (gains_knowledge(X0) => smarter(X0)) [input(axiom)]
4. reads(harry,walden) [input(axiom)]
7. smarter(harry) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~smarter(harry) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ~smarter(harry) [flattening 8]
12. ! [X0,X1] : (gains_knowledge(X0) | ~reads(X0,X1)) [ennf transformation 2]
13. ! [X0] : (smarter(X0) | ~gains_knowledge(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
14. ~reads(X0,X1) | gains_knowledge(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
15. ~gains_knowledge(X0) | smarter(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
16. reads(harry,walden) [cnf transformation 4]
18. ~smarter(harry) [cnf transformation 9]
19. gains_knowledge(harry) [resolution 14,16]
20. smarter(harry) [resolution 19,15]
21. $false [forward subsumption resolution 20,18]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:

    harry != walden).

% SZS output end Saturation.
